tests.name: Editable Default Test
tests.question: Can the default still be revised, contested, bypassed, or reopened?

tests.name: Distributed Authority Test
tests.question: Are design, revision, appeal, exit, audit, and rollback authority distributed?

tests.name: Rollback Window Test
tests.question: Is rollback still materially feasible before restoration cost crosses threshold?

tests.name: Exception Channel Test
tests.question: Can non-default signals re-enter and affect the transition path?

closure_risk_rule: Any failed test increases closure regime risk.
